svdb4.finding: Oracle AUROC=0.347 (BELOW RANDOM!) - future var doesn't predict current anomaly labels

smd.finding: Past detection (0.737) beats oracle prediction (0.636) - evaluation rewards detection not prediction

conclusion: On SVDB4: oracle AUROC=0.347 (below random), proving current label ≠ future anomaly. On SMD: oracle > random but past var still beats oracle (0.737 vs 0.636). Both confirm F1-tolerance rewards anomaly detection proximity, not true future prediction.
